target.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp AS time, log_entry AS text, log_type AS tags
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND log_entry IS NOT NULL
  AND log_type = 'Internet connection'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(sendrate)*8 AS "UP", avg(receiverate)*8 AS "DOWN",
  avg(downstreammax) AS "DOWN Max", avg(downstream_dsl_sync_max)*1000 AS "DOWN DSL Sync",
  avg(downstreamphysicalmax) AS "DOWN Physical Max", avg(upstreammax) AS "UP netto Max",
  avg(upstream_dsl_sync_max)*1000 AS "UP DSL Sync", avg(upstreamphysicalmax) AS "UP Physical Max"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (sendrate IS NOT NULL OR receiverate IS NOT NULL
       OR downstreammax IS NOT NULL OR downstream_dsl_sync_max IS NOT NULL
       OR upstreammax IS NOT NULL OR upstream_dsl_sync_max IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  sum(crc_errors_delta) AS "CRC Errors",
  sum(errored_seconds_delta) AS "Errored Seconds",
  sum(severely_errored_seconds_delta) AS "Severely Errored Seconds"
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp,
    CASE WHEN previous_crc_errors IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN crc_errors >= previous_crc_errors THEN crc_errors - previous_crc_errors
      ELSE 0 END AS crc_errors_delta,
    CASE WHEN previous_errored_seconds IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN errored_seconds >= previous_errored_seconds THEN errored_seconds - previous_errored_seconds
      ELSE 0 END AS errored_seconds_delta,
    CASE WHEN previous_severely_errored_seconds IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN severely_errored_seconds >= previous_severely_errored_seconds THEN severely_errored_seconds - previous_severely_errored_seconds
      ELSE 0 END AS severely_errored_seconds_delta
  FROM (
    SELECT timestamp, box, crc_errors, errored_seconds, severely_errored_seconds, lag(crc_errors) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_crc_errors, lag(errored_seconds) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_errored_seconds, lag(severely_errored_seconds) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_severely_errored_seconds
    FROM ${measurement}
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
      AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
      AND (crc_errors IS NOT NULL OR errored_seconds IS NOT NULL OR severely_errored_seconds IS NOT NULL)
  )
)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, log_entry AS line, log_type
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND log_entry IS NOT NULL AND log_type != 'FritzInfluxDB'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5

panels.description: Is there a Fritz!OS update available

targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp AS time, upgrade_available AS "Upgrade Available"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND upgrade_available IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.title: Update

targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp AS time, linkuptime AS "Link Uptime (s)"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND linkuptime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT sum(receiverate) * 8 AS "receiverate"
FROM (
  SELECT box, receiverate
  FROM ${measurement}
  WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m', -5, now())
    AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
    AND receiverate IS NOT NULL
  LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box
)

SELECT sum(sendrate) * 8 AS "sendrate"
FROM (
  SELECT box, sendrate
  FROM ${measurement}
  WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m', -5, now())
    AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
    AND sendrate IS NOT NULL
  LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY box
)

SELECT timestamp AS time, cpu_temp AS "CPU Temp (°C)"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND cpu_temp IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT timestamp AS time, cpu_utilization AS "CPU %"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND cpu_utilization IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  ram_usage_fixed AS "RAM Fixed", ram_usage_dynamic AS "RAM Dynamic"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (ram_usage_fixed IS NOT NULL OR ram_usage_dynamic IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT timestamp AS time, sum(delta) OVER (ORDER BY timestamp) AS "Upload Last 24h"
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp,
    CASE WHEN previous_value IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytessent >= previous_value THEN totalbytessent - previous_value
      ELSE 0
    END AS delta
  FROM (
    SELECT timestamp, totalbytessent, lag(totalbytessent) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_value
    FROM ${measurement}
    WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
      AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
      AND totalbytessent IS NOT NULL
  )
)

SELECT timestamp AS time, sum(delta) OVER (ORDER BY timestamp) AS "Download Last 24h"
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp,
    CASE WHEN previous_value IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytesreceived >= previous_value THEN totalbytesreceived - previous_value
      ELSE 0
    END AS delta
  FROM (
    SELECT timestamp, totalbytesreceived, lag(totalbytesreceived) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_value
    FROM ${measurement}
    WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
      AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
      AND totalbytesreceived IS NOT NULL
  )
)

SELECT timestamp AS time, num_active_host AS "Active Hosts"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND num_active_host IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT timestamp AS time, systemuptime AS "System Uptime (s)"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND systemuptime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  sum(totalbytessent_delta) AS "Upload",
  sum(totalbytesreceived_delta) AS "Download"
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp,
    CASE WHEN previous_totalbytessent IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytessent >= previous_totalbytessent THEN totalbytessent - previous_totalbytessent
      ELSE 0 END AS totalbytessent_delta,
    CASE WHEN previous_totalbytesreceived IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytesreceived >= previous_totalbytesreceived THEN totalbytesreceived - previous_totalbytesreceived
      ELSE 0 END AS totalbytesreceived_delta
  FROM (
    SELECT timestamp, box, totalbytessent, totalbytesreceived, lag(totalbytessent) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_totalbytessent, lag(totalbytesreceived) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_totalbytesreceived
    FROM ${measurement}
    WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -7, now())
      AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
      AND (totalbytessent IS NOT NULL OR totalbytesreceived IS NOT NULL)
  )
)
SAMPLE BY 1d ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  sum(totalbytessent_delta) AS "Upload",
  sum(totalbytesreceived_delta) AS "Download"
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp,
    CASE WHEN previous_totalbytessent IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytessent >= previous_totalbytessent THEN totalbytessent - previous_totalbytessent
      ELSE 0 END AS totalbytessent_delta,
    CASE WHEN previous_totalbytesreceived IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytesreceived >= previous_totalbytesreceived THEN totalbytesreceived - previous_totalbytesreceived
      ELSE 0 END AS totalbytesreceived_delta
  FROM (
    SELECT timestamp, box, totalbytessent, totalbytesreceived, lag(totalbytessent) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_totalbytessent, lag(totalbytesreceived) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_totalbytesreceived
    FROM ${measurement}
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
      AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
      AND (totalbytessent IS NOT NULL OR totalbytesreceived IS NOT NULL)
  )
)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS day,
  sum(totalbytessent_delta) AS "Upload",
  sum(totalbytesreceived_delta) AS "Download"
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp,
    CASE WHEN previous_totalbytessent IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytessent >= previous_totalbytessent THEN totalbytessent - previous_totalbytessent
      ELSE 0 END AS totalbytessent_delta,
    CASE WHEN previous_totalbytesreceived IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN totalbytesreceived >= previous_totalbytesreceived THEN totalbytesreceived - previous_totalbytesreceived
      ELSE 0 END AS totalbytesreceived_delta
  FROM (
    SELECT timestamp, box, totalbytessent, totalbytesreceived, lag(totalbytessent) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_totalbytessent, lag(totalbytesreceived) OVER (PARTITION BY box ORDER BY timestamp) AS previous_totalbytesreceived
    FROM ${measurement}
    WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -7, now())
      AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
      AND (totalbytessent IS NOT NULL OR totalbytesreceived IS NOT NULL)
  )
)
SAMPLE BY 1d ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT last(totalbytessent) AS "Upload Since Connection"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND totalbytessent IS NOT NULL

SELECT last(totalbytesreceived) AS "Download Since Connection"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND totalbytesreceived IS NOT NULL

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(wlan1_associations) AS "wlan1_associations",
  avg(wlan2_associations) AS "wlan2_associations",
  avg(wlan3_associations) AS "wlan3_associations"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (wlan1_associations IS NOT NULL OR wlan2_associations IS NOT NULL OR wlan3_associations IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(wlan1_channel) AS "wlan1_channel",
  avg(wlan2_channel) AS "wlan2_channel",
  avg(wlan3_channel) AS "wlan3_channel"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (wlan1_channel IS NOT NULL OR wlan2_channel IS NOT NULL OR wlan3_channel IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT last_not_null(wlan1_ssid) AS "Name", last_not_null(wlan1_status) AS "Status",
  last_not_null(wlan1_802_11_standard) AS "Standard", last_not_null(wlan1_channel) AS "Channel",
  last_not_null(wlan1_associations) AS "Clients", '2.4 GHz' AS "Band"
  FROM ${measurement}
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
) WHERE "Name" IS NOT NULL OR "Status" IS NOT NULL OR "Standard" IS NOT NULL
  OR "Channel" IS NOT NULL OR "Clients" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT last_not_null(wlan2_ssid) AS "Name", last_not_null(wlan2_status) AS "Status",
  last_not_null(wlan2_802_11_standard) AS "Standard", last_not_null(wlan2_channel) AS "Channel",
  last_not_null(wlan2_associations) AS "Clients", '5 GHz' AS "Band"
  FROM ${measurement}
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
) WHERE "Name" IS NOT NULL OR "Status" IS NOT NULL OR "Standard" IS NOT NULL
  OR "Channel" IS NOT NULL OR "Clients" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT last_not_null(wlan3_ssid) AS "Name", last_not_null(wlan3_status) AS "Status",
  last_not_null(wlan3_802_11_standard) AS "Standard", last_not_null(wlan3_channel) AS "Channel",
  last_not_null(wlan3_associations) AS "Clients", 'Guest' AS "Band"
  FROM ${measurement}
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
) WHERE "Name" IS NOT NULL OR "Status" IS NOT NULL OR "Standard" IS NOT NULL
  OR "Channel" IS NOT NULL OR "Clients" IS NOT NULL

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(cpu_utilization) AS "cpu_utilization"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (cpu_utilization IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(ram_usage_fixed) AS "ram_usage_fixed"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (ram_usage_fixed IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(ram_usage_dynamic) AS "ram_usage_dynamic"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (ram_usage_dynamic IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(ram_usage_free) AS "ram_usage_free"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (ram_usage_free IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(cpu_temp) AS "cpu_temp"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (cpu_temp IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT timestamp AS time, energy_consumption AS "Energy (W)"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND energy_consumption IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT last_not_null(external_ip) AS "IPv4", last_not_null(external_ipv6) AS "IPv6",
  last_not_null(ipv6_prefix) AS "IPv6 Prefix", last_not_null(ipv6_prefix_length) AS "IPv6 Prefix Length",
  last_not_null(model) AS "Model", last_not_null(serialnumber) AS "Serial",
  last_not_null(softwareversion) AS "SW Version", last_not_null(last_auth_error) AS "Last Auth Error",
  last_not_null(CASE WHEN myfritz_host_name = '' THEN NULL ELSE myfritz_host_name END) AS "MyFritz Hostname"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'

SELECT last_not_null(physicallinktype) AS "Link Type", last_not_null(dsl_line_length) AS "DSL Line Length",
  last_not_null(dsl_dslam_vendor) AS "DSL DSLAM Vendor", last_not_null(dsl_dslam_sw_version) AS "DSL Model Version",
  last_not_null(dsl_line_mode) AS "DSL Line Mode", last_not_null(cable_cmts_vendor) AS "Cable Vendor",
  last_not_null(cable_line_mode) AS "Cable Line Mode", last_not_null(cable_modem_version) AS "Cable Modem Version",
  last_not_null(cable_num_ds_channels) AS "Cable Downstream Channels", last_not_null(cable_num_us_channels) AS "Cable Upstream Channels",
  last_not_null(connection_status) AS "IP Connection Status", last_not_null(last_connection_error) AS "Last Connection Error",
  last_not_null(remote_pop) AS "Remote Pop", last_not_null(physical_connection_status) AS "Link Connection Status"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  avg(vpn_user_num_active) AS "vpn_user_num_active"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (vpn_user_num_active IS NOT NULL)
SAMPLE BY $__sampleByInterval ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT last_not_null(vpn_type) AS "VPN Type", last_not_null(vpn_user_num_active) AS "VPN User Active"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (vpn_type IS NOT NULL OR vpn_user_num_active IS NOT NULL)

SELECT last_not_null(ddns_domain) AS "Domain",
  last_not_null(CASE WHEN ddns_enabled IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN ddns_enabled THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END) AS "Enabled",
  last_not_null(ddns_mode) AS "Mode", last_not_null(ddns_provider_name) AS "Provider",
  last_not_null(ddns_status_ipv4) AS "Status IPv4", last_not_null(ddns_status_ipv6) AS "Status IPv6"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND (ddns_domain IS NOT NULL OR ddns_enabled IS NOT NULL OR ddns_mode IS NOT NULL
       OR ddns_provider_name IS NOT NULL OR ddns_status_ipv4 IS NOT NULL OR ddns_status_ipv6 IS NOT NULL)

SELECT name AS "Name", vpn_type AS "Type",
  last_not_null(CASE WHEN vpn_user_active IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN vpn_user_active THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END) AS "Active", last_not_null(CASE WHEN vpn_user_connected IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN vpn_user_connected THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END) AS "Connected",
  last_not_null(vpn_user_virtual_address) AS "Virtual Address", last_not_null(vpn_user_remote_address) AS "Remote Address"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND name IS NOT NULL
  AND (vpn_user_active IS NOT NULL OR vpn_user_connected IS NOT NULL OR vpn_user_virtual_address IS NOT NULL OR vpn_user_remote_address IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY name, vpn_type
ORDER BY name

SELECT timestamp AS time, active_hosts_name AS "Name",
  active_hosts_mac AS "MAC", active_hosts_ipv4 AS "IPv4",
  active_hosts_type AS "Type", active_hosts_parent AS "Parent",
  active_hosts_port AS "Port", active_hosts_additional_text AS "Info",
  active_hosts_ipv4_last_used AS "Last seen"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND active_hosts_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

SELECT timestamp AS time, passive_hosts_name AS "Name",
  passive_hosts_mac AS "MAC", passive_hosts_ipv4 AS "IPv4",
  passive_hosts_port AS "Port"
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('h', -1, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND passive_hosts_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

list.description: Measurement name for the fritzflux data
list.label: FritzBox
list.name: measurement
list.query: SELECT table_name FROM tables() WHERE table_name LIKE 'fritzbox%' ORDER BY table_name
list.definition: SELECT table_name FROM tables() WHERE table_name LIKE 'fritzbox%' ORDER BY table_name

SELECT DISTINCT box
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY box
list.label: FritzBox
list.name: boxtag
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT box
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND box IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY box

list.definition:
SELECT fritzfluxdb_setting_timezone
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -2, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND fritzfluxdb_setting_timezone IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
list.name: timezone
list.query:
SELECT fritzfluxdb_setting_timezone
FROM ${measurement}
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('d', -2, now())
  AND box ~ '^${boxtag:regex}$'
  AND fritzfluxdb_setting_timezone IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
